name: Fettuccine with Tomato Basil & Yogurt Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup basil leaves, freshly chopped fine
1/2 cup scallions, thinly chopped (including the tender green leaves)
1 lb fettuccine cooked al dente according to package directions
recipeInstructions:
1. Have all ingredients ready.
2. Cook 1 lb fettuccine al dente according to package directions.
3. In a large bowl, combine basil, parsley, scallions, and tomatoes; toss well.
4. Spoon yogurt over the herbs and vegetables; blend well.
5. Taste and add salt and pepper if necessary.
6. Divide hot fettuccine among four warm bowls.
7. Spoon sauce over pasta and serve immediately.
